states.error: We couldn't load your bookings. Please try again.

list.title: My bookings
list.subtitle: Track your consultation requests, confirmed sessions, completed bookings, and closed outcomes from the student side.

notes.pending: Your booking request is waiting for the consultant to review it.
notes.confirmed: The consultant accepted your request and the session is now confirmed.
notes.completed: The consultation was delivered successfully and the booking is closed.
notes.closed: This booking is closed. Rejected, expired, and cancelled requests stay visible for reference.

empty.title: No bookings in this view
empty.description: No bookings match the selected filter right now. Try another filter or create a new consultation booking.

details.title: Booking details
details.subtitle: Review your consultation request, booking status, and workflow progress from the student side.
details.meetingNote: Your consultation is held in a built-in video room. Join from here when it's time — the room opens 15 minutes before the scheduled start.
details.cancelConfirm: Cancel this booking request? The consultant has not responded yet, so the payment hold is released.

meeting.title: Session room
meeting.waiting: Waiting for the other participant to join…
meeting.errorGeneric: Could not connect to the session. The room opens 15 minutes before the scheduled time.
meeting.errorNotOpenYet: The session room is not open yet. It opens 15 minutes before the scheduled start time.
meeting.errorRoomClosed: The session room has closed. Sessions remain joinable until 15 minutes after the scheduled end time.
meeting.errorNotParticipant: You are not a participant of this booking, so you cannot join its session.
meeting.errorPermissionDenied: ScholarPath needs access to your camera and microphone to join the session. Grant permission in your browser and try again.
meeting.errorNotConfigured: Video calling isn't enabled on this environment yet. Please contact support or use your scheduled meeting link.
meeting.recordingNotice: This session is being recorded. The recording is available afterwards to you, the consultant, and ScholarPath admins.
meeting.downloadError: Could not download the recording. Please try again.
meeting.errorNotConfirmed: This session is no longer available — the booking may have been cancelled or has not yet been confirmed. Go back and check your bookings.

notFound.title: Booking not found
notFound.description: This booking could not be loaded. It may have been removed, or you may not have access to it.

rating.ctaDescription: Your session is complete. Share a quick rating to help other students choose the right consultant.
rating.alreadyRatedDescription: Thank you — your rating for this session has been recorded.
rating.title: Rate {{consultant}}
rating.description: Pick a star rating from 1 to 5 and add an optional note about your session.
rating.commentPlaceholder: What stood out about this session? (optional)

errors.pleaseSelectRating: Please pick a star rating before submitting.

summaries.pending: Your booking request was created successfully and is now waiting for the consultant to review it.
summaries.confirmed: The consultant accepted your request. Your consultation is now confirmed at the selected date and time.
summaries.completed: The consultation was completed successfully and the booking is now closed from the student side.
summaries.closed: This booking is closed. Rejected, expired, and cancelled requests remain visible in your booking history.

guidance.pending: Pending requests are still under consultant review and may move to confirmed or rejected depending on consultant action.
guidance.confirmed: Confirmed requests mean your slot is reserved and the consultant accepted the session.
guidance.closed: Completed requests are closed successfully. Rejected and cancelled requests remain visible in history for reference.

timeline.requestedDescription: You selected a consultation slot and submitted the booking request.
timeline.reviewDescription: The consultant reviews the request and decides whether to accept or reject it.
timeline.confirmedDescription: The consultant accepted the request and the session is scheduled.
timeline.outcomeDescription: After the scheduled time the booking is completed, or closed if it did not proceed.

checkout.title: Booking checkout
checkout.subtitle: Review the selected consultant, session details, and payment summary before confirming your booking.

noSlot.title: No consultation slot selected
noSlot.description: Start from the consultant browsing flow, choose a consultant, and select an available slot before continuing to checkout.

success.title: Booking request sent
success.description: Your consultation request was submitted to the consultant. You'll be notified once they accept or reject it.

sessionSummary.title: Session summary
sessionSummary.description: Confirm the consultant and selected slot before sending your booking request.

notes.label: Anything the consultant should know? (optional)
notes.placeholder: e.g. I'm applying for a Fulbright grant and want to focus on the personal statement.
notes.hint: Up to 1000 characters. Shown to the consultant on their booking-details page so they can prep.

checkout.paymentMissing: We couldn't open the payment form. Please cancel this booking and try again.

paymentStep.title: Payment
paymentStep.description: Authorize the session fee — it is held securely and only charged when the consultant accepts your booking.

payment.authorized: Payment authorized — held until the consultant accepts.
payment.cardOptionDescription: This page is prepared for Stripe handoff. These inputs simulate the payment step until real Stripe Elements are connected.

savePaymentMethod.label: Save payment method for future bookings
savePaymentMethod.description: Placeholder behavior for a future stored-card flow.

holdNotice.title: Booking request notice
holdNotice.description: When you continue, your booking request is sent to the consultant. The session is confirmed only after the consultant accepts it.
holdNotice.acceptLabel: I understand and accept the booking request behavior for this consultation.

checkout.confirmationNote: By continuing, you confirm the selected consultant, selected slot, and booking terms before sending your request.

errors.expiryFormat: Expiry date must be in MM/YY format.
errors.expiryMonthRange: Expiry month must be between 01 and 12.
errors.holdNoticeRequired: You must confirm the booking request notice before continuing.
